name: Defined chemostat medium, succinate carbon source + nitrate electron acceptor (high-copper, [Cu]=13 umol/L) (PMC3831637)
description: defined chemostat medium, succinate carbon source + nitrate electron acceptor (high-copper, [Cu]=13 umol/L) — medium reported in PMC3831637 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC3831637 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: auto-extracted; O2/carbon verified from paper, full recipe cited from an external reference (manual review)
provenance.verification_note: PMC3831637 is a modeling paper on P. denitrificans denitrification; it does NOT contain the defined medium's salts, buffer, vitamins, trace-element list, or carbon source with amounts (these are only cited from Felgate et al. 2012).
